news-global-econ.title: WATCH: Platner doesn't apologize to Purple Heart recipient, voters when confronted on post mocking soldier
news-global-econ.description: Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner declined to apologize for a deleted Reddit post saying a Purple Heart recipient "didn't deserve to live."

news-global-econ.title: LNG tanker exits Hormuz for India for first time since war began
news-global-econ.description: LNG tanker departs Hormuz for India, marking the first shipment since the Iran war began amid ongoing regional tensions.

news-global-econ.title: Secret Service reportedly takes down gunman outside White House after shots fired | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: Fox News chief congressional correspondent Chad Pergram reports on gunshots heard outside the White House on 'The Big Weekend Show.'

news-global-econ.title: New details emerge in death of Kyle Busch as NASCAR world remains in shock | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: Fox News senior medical analyst Dr. Marc Siegel discusses the death of NASCAR star Kyle Busch on ‘The Ingraham Angle.’

news-global-econ.title: House Dem Whip Clark Dodges on Need to Lower Spending to Lower Rates
news-global-econ.description: On Friday’s broadcast of CNBC’s “Squawk Box,” House Minority Whip Rep. Katherine Clark (D-MA) responded to a question on addressing affordability when the big issues are gas prices and interest rates, the latter of which will likely require decreasing governm…

news-global-soc.title: LNG tanker exits Hormuz for India for first time since war began
news-global-soc.description: LNG tanker departs Hormuz for India, marking the first shipment since the Iran war began amid ongoing regional tensions.

news-global-soc.title: Iranian national team to train in Mexico during World Cup after base camp switch, federation leader says
news-global-soc.description: Iran says its 2026 World Cup training camp has been moved from the United States to Mexico after getting approval from FIFA, the federation announced.

news-global-soc.title: Feds subpoena Hasan Piker, Medea Benjamin over Cuba trips
news-global-soc.description: Hasan Piker and CodePink cofounder Medea Benjamin face Treasury subpoenas in a federal probe into whether activists violated U.S. Cuba sanctions.

news-global-soc.title: EXCLUSIVE: Air Force debuts historic 8-ship bomber-fighter formation over Miami Beach
news-global-soc.description: A historic Memorial Day weekend flyover dubbed the "Arsenal of Freedom" featured B-52, B-1B, F-22 and F-35 aircraft soaring over Miami Beach crowds.

news-global-soc.title: Lindsay Lohan, Brooks Nader and Halsey heat up red carpets in sky-high slits and sheer gowns
news-global-soc.description: Hollywood's biggest stars stepped out in revealing black dresses this week, with sheer gowns and high slits dominating red carpets from Cannes to Milan.
